title: Blind Accounts
description: Create and manage stealth (blind) accounts. A blind account is a labeled keypair used as a confidential recipient.
createDescription: Generate a new stealth account from a 16-word brain key. Write the brain key down and store it somewhere safe — it is the only way to recover this account.
brainKeyGenerated: Your generated brain key (write it down):
passwordPlaceholder: Used to encrypt the private key
passwordWarning: You are the sole custodian of this passphrase. If it is lost, the encrypted blind account cannot be recovered by anyone — including us. There is no reset.
importDescription: Restore a blind account from a 16-word brain key or a WIF private key.
noAccounts: No blind accounts yet. Create or import one to use it as a confidential recipient.
removeConfirm: Remove this blind account? The encrypted private key will be deleted from this device. Make sure you have a backup.
restoreError: Could not read the backup file. Make sure it is a valid blind account backup.
decryptDescription: Enter the passphrase used to encrypt this blind account to use it.
errorInvalidWif: The provided WIF private key is invalid.
errorDecrypt: Wrong passphrase — could not decrypt the private key.
errorLabelExists: A blind account with this label already exists.
